name: Orange Frosted Sour Cream Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Cream together the sugar and margarine until well combined. Mix in the eggs, sour cream, juice, rind, and dry ingredients alternately. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto a greased cookie sheet. Bake at 400 degrees for 8-10 minutes (check after 6 minutes).
Icing: Combine the last four ingredients with milk to desired consistency. Spread over cooled cookies.
